source_pr.title: server, tikv: enable unit test run parallel and add parallel flag for go coverage test
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
make all go unit test support `-check.p true` flag so we can run go test more quickly

### What is changed and how it works?
- change several test suite/test cases into `SerialSuites` to enable  `-check.p true` flag 
- optimize some test cases for store/tikv package
- add `-check.p true` for task `gotest` in Makefile to make it run faster to speed up pipeline `idc-jenkins-ci-tidb/check_dev_2`

results:
before changes:
```
$ make gotest
github.com/pingcap/tidb/planner/core	11.878s
github.com/pingcap/tidb/server	24.737s
github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv	52.393s
Total Cost: 2'22''
```

after changes:
```
make gotest
github.com/pingcap/tidb/planner/core	5.140s
github.com/pingcap/tidb/server	14.331s
github.com/pingcap/tidb/store/tikv	32.132s
Total Cost: 1'35''
```

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

Side effects

Related changes

Release note

symptoms: PR enables parallel unit test runs (`-check.p true`) and fixes a data race by guarding `setSystemTimeZoneVariable` with `sync.Once` (server/server.go).
failure_signature: PR enables parallel unit test runs (`-check.p true`) and fixes a data race by guarding `setSystemTimeZoneVariable` with `sync.Once` (server/server.go).
root_cause_explanation: Enabling parallel check-suite runs (`-check.p true`) exposed shared global state races. In particular, multiple servers could concurrently update the global `system_time_zone` sysvar, causing a data race. The PR stabilizes parallel unit test runs by guarding `setSystemTimeZoneVariable` with `sync.Once` and by moving side-effecting suites into `SerialSuites` to avoid cross-test interference.
fix_pattern: Guard `setSystemTimeZoneVariable` with `sync.Once` and move side-effecting suites to `SerialSuites` to make parallel `-check.p` unit-test runs safe.

evidence: evidence: // only the first will actually do setSystemTimeZoneVariable, thus we can avoid data race. (server/server.go)
evidence: wrap setSystemTimeZoneVariable with sync.Once for parallel run tests (server/server.go)

files: Makefile, executor/ddl_test.go, executor/seqtest/seq_executor_test.go, infoschema/tables_test.go, server/conn_stmt_test.go, server/http_handler_test.go, server/server.go, server/server_test.go, server/statistics_handler_test.go, server/tidb_test.go, session/tidb.go, session/tidb_test.go, statistics/analyze_jobs_test.go, store/tikv/2pc_test.go, store/tikv/client_test.go, store/tikv/isolation_test.go, store/tikv/sql_fail_test.go, store/tikv/store_fail_test.go, store/tikv/store_test.go, store/tikv/ticlient_test.go, store/tikv/tikv_test.go
